can someone summarize chapters 1 and 2 of arc 2 for me? Don't really want to keep reading the ai translation so but I don't want to be lost for chapters 3 and 4.

Ch1

||Keeper wakes up as a brain in a vat. They learn that this is an alternate timeline universe from Kadath. The Gdoll of this timeline captured keeper's consciousness in a brain for her own nefarious purposes.||

||Keeper manages to get a human body and escape, blowing up the lab in the process. In the ruins, they discover a Gdoll who lost her memory. Amnesiac Gdoll is no longer homicidal (but still an asshole). They team up and explore the new world. Keeper finds out that it is sort of a post-apocalyptic version of Kadath where the sun is black. In the process, they meet alternate timeline versions of aigis, jenkin, and other awakeners.||

||In the end of the chapter, we learn that the amnesiac gdoll is actually one of gdoll's defective spare bodies that woke up. The real gdoll is pissed. With Friend!Gdoll's help, keeper defeats the real gdoll's current body and locks her in the brain vat. Friendly!Gdoll takes over the laboratory and promises to assist keeper in their adventures.||

Ch2

||Keeper learns that William might be in this universe. Searching for him, they enter a sanatorium. This sanatorium turns out to be Clementine's lair. She is using it to turn people into insectoids to join an evil hive mind from outer space. It's a long story. Anyway, Clementine traps keeper in the sanatorium.||

||Keeper finds William as a young boy in the sanatorium. Apparently, he got captured too and lost his memories. They try to escape Clementine's spooky jumpscare sanatorium together.||

||Deep in the sanatorium, Keeper discovers Clementine's human side, the last remaining bit of goodness in her heart which Clementine's insect side locked away. They free Human!Clementine and fight Insect!Clementine with her help. This causes Clementine to have a change of heart and decide that locking the keeper in a sanatorium to brainwash them into an insect monster is not cool actually. They let the keeper and William go.||

||Upon exiting the sanatorium, william disappears and keeper goes looking for him again.||
